word: H3313 - יָפַע - yâphaʻ - yaw-fah' - Be light

sections.paragraph:
Original: יפע

Transliteration: yâpha‛

Phonetic: yaw-fah'

BDB Definition:

  1. to shine, shine forth or out, cause to shine, send out beams
    1. (Hiphil)
      1. to shine out, shine forth, send out beams
      2. to cause to shine

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 892

Part(s) of speech: Verb
